name: taobao-mtg-visual-collector
description: Local visual collection tooling spike for Taobao MTG price evidence.

scripts.midscene:version: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['node_modules/@midscene/web/package.json','node_modules/@midscene/computer/package.json']) { const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); console.log(pkg.name, pkg.version); }"
